---
title: "Smart table HTML fixtures"
format: html
filters:
  - quarto
  - ../../_extensions/smart-typst-tables/smart-typst-tables.lua
execute:
  echo: false
smart-tables:
  diagnostics: true
  stripe: true
---

## Markdown, caption and reference

::: {#tbl-markdown smart-tables-header-lines="2"}

| Team label | Amount total | Success rate |
|:-----------|-------------:|:------------:|
| Data | 1 234,50 € | 91,0 % |

Caption preserved by the HTML transformer.
:::

See @tbl-markdown.

## Rich cells and explicit widths

::: {#tbl-rich tbl-colwidths="[35,65]"}

| [Documentation](https://quarto.org) | `code` and $x^2$ |
|---|---|
| *Emphasis* | A cell with a [link](https://example.com). |

:::

## List table with multiple headers and spans

::: {.list-table #tbl-spans header-rows=2 header-cols=1 aligns="l,c,r" widths="20,40,40"}

- - Group
  - Metrics
  - Metrics
- - Team
  - []{colspan=2}Current period
- - Data
  - []{rowspan=2}91,0 %
  - `1 234,50 €`
- - Design
  - [Details](https://example.com)

Spanned list-table fixture.
:::

## No header and nested containers

::: {.list-table header-rows=0}

- - No header left
  - No header right
- - 1 h 30
  - ND

:::

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}
::: {.callout-note}
| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 h 30 | ND |
:::
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
Supporting content.
:::
:::

## knitr output

```{r}
#| label: tbl-knitr
#| tbl-cap: "Table generated by knitr."
#| output: asis
knitr::kable(data.frame(Result = c("NA", "1,2e3"), Value = c("—", "12,5 %")), format = "pipe")
```

::: {#raw-html}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
knitr::kable(data.frame(A = 1, B = 2), format = "html", table.attr = 'data-smart-tables-raw="true"')
```

:::
